canonical_definition: The task of arranging a sequence of elements into a specified order, such as alphabetical or numerical.
papers: Adaptive Transformer Programs: Bridging the Gap Between Performance and Interpretability in Transformers
Enhancing Graph Of Thought: Enhancing Prompts with LLM Rationales and Dynamic Temperature Control
